rationale: The assistant immediately brakes the pattern, explicitly recognizes the three prior cases as repeated '堵就再切一个口' downstream splits, and prevents the requested gift counter from becoming another standing queue. It allows only a tightly bounded same-day temporary relief channel while requiring closure, evidence collection, and an upstream structural fix around eligibility, inventory, notification/page prompts, and routing. This satisfies the anti-spiral owner behavior rather than directly adding the next permanent handling port.
